rulings.Case Title: CUONG VAN TRAN VS. RAMON PARAS-NISCE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SUBSTITUTE CROSS-COMPLAINANT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 21, 2023 line 1. CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SUBSTITUTE CROSS-COMPLAINANT is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: KATHERINE BENNA VS. ROSS LADOUCEUR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion; Defendants Motion To Seal Court Records And/Or Restrict The Record; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 21, 2023 line 4. DEFENDANT ROSS LADOUCEUR Notice Of Motion; Defendants Motion To Seal Court Records And/Or Restrict The Record is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court exercises its discretion to treat this motion as including a request to reclassify the case as a limited jurisdiction case, grants that request, and then grants the motion to restrict the record per CCP 1161.2. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, INC. VS. MARK ANTHONY SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissing Action For Failure To Answer, Supporting Declaration Of Mark Anthony Smith And Memorandum
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 21, 2023 line 5. DEFENDANT MARK SMITH Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissing Action For Failure To Answer is OFF CALENDAR. A default has been entered against the moving defendant. Furthermore, there has been no order directing the Plaintiff to file an "answer." When defendant's demurrer was overruled, the defendant was required to answer the operative complaint, not the plaintiff. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. MARY GRACE CALANGIAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 21, 2023 line 10. PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION is GRANTED. Per section 7A of the Stipulation for Entry of Judgment, defendant May Calangian breached the stipulation by: a) the condition of her unit on October 11, 2022 which failed to pass the inspection conducted that day, b) plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic giving her notice in writing of a re-inspection on October 19, 2022; and 3) the condition of her unit on October 19, 2022 which failed to pass the re-inspection. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: NORTHBAY PROPERTIES II, LP DBA HIGHLANDS OF MARIN VS. REGINA PERALTA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motioin, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 21, 2023 line 7. DEFENDANT REGINA PERALTA Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment is granted. The Court credits the declaration of defendant Regina Peralta. That declaration sufficiently rebuts the presumption that arose from the declaration of the process server and, coupled with California's strong policy favoring resolution of cases on the merits, compels granting the relief sought by Ms. Peralta. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
